name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-adaptive-card-dialog-csharp
title: Adaptive Card dialog (C#)
shortDescription: A declarative agent demonstrating how to open dialog boxes from Adaptive Cards in Microsoft 365 Copilot, built with C# and .NET 10
longDescription: This sample demonstrates how to open dialog boxes from Adaptive Cards in a Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agent. Users can browse programming tutorials for Node.js, JavaScript, and Git, watch official Microsoft video tutorials embedded in dialog boxes, and take interactive quizzes with instant feedback—all within the Copilot interface. The sample showcases Action.OpenUrlDialog from Adaptive Cards v1.5, an Azure Functions backend written in C# (.NET 10), and API Plugin integration.

thumbnails.alt: Declarative Agent with API Plugin for Microsoft 365 Copilot Sample (C#)
